content.speakerText: Hey, we're hitting up that new Italian place this Saturday—you in?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我们周六去那家新意大利餐厅，来吗？

options.text: Sure, I love Italian food! What time?
Thanks so much for inviting me! I already have plans that day, but let's catch up next weekend?
No, I'm busy. Don't bother me.
I'll think about it and text you later.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了‘三明治法’：感谢 + 婉拒 + 提议改期，符合礼貌社交规范。选项1是接受邀请，不符合拒绝场景；选项3过于生硬，缺乏礼貌；选项4模糊不清，未明确拒绝，可能让对方继续纠缠。

content.speakerText: C'mon, it'll be fun! You never come out anymore.
content.speakerTextCn: 来嘛，肯定好玩！你最近都不出门了。

options.text: I don't care about your party. I'm staying home.
I really miss hanging out with you guys—I promise I'll make it next time. This weekend’s just not possible.
Maybe, if you invite me again next week.

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了情感共鸣（I really miss hanging out）+ 真诚拒绝 + 承诺未来，有效缓解对方情绪。选项1攻击性强，破坏关系；选项3自我贬低，不积极；选项4未明确拒绝当前邀请，语义模糊。

content.speakerText: We're having a BBQ this Sunday at my place—want to join?
content.speakerTextCn: 这周日在我家烧烤，来吗？

options.text: I'm sorry, I can't. I have to work.
That sounds amazing! I'll bring dessert.
Thanks for inviting me! I’ve got a family dinner that day, but I’d love to come next time!

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了礼貌的三明治结构：感谢+拒绝+改期，是社交拒绝的最佳实践。选项1虽拒绝但缺乏感谢与改期建议，显得生硬；选项2是接受，不符合场景；选项4直接否定偏好，易伤感情。

content.template: Thanks so much for inviting me! I already have plans that day, but let's catch up ______?
content.hint: 在婉拒周末邀请时，常用‘next weekend’提议改期，表达诚意
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：提议改期的常用时间短语

content.template: I really miss hanging out with you guys—I promise I'll make it ______. This weekend’s just not possible.
content.hint: 在表达未来承诺时，'next time' 是最自然、最常用的泛指表达
content.knowledgePoint: 社交拒绝中的未来承诺表达：next time

content.template: I know I've been a ghost lately—thanks for ______ me!
content.hint: 固定搭配：get someone (out) = 邀请某人外出聚会
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：get someone (out) —— 社交邀请中的惯用表达

content.speakerText: Hey, we're hitting up that new Italian place this Saturday—you in?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我们周六去那家新意大利餐厅，来吗？
expectedAnswers: Thanks for inviting me! I already have plans, but let's plan something next weekend?
That sounds great—I really appreciate it! Unfortunately, I'm tied up this Saturday, but I'd love to join you next time!
Wow, thanks for thinking of me! I can't make it this time, but let me know when you're doing it again!
evaluationCriteria: 是否清晰表达了拒绝，避免模棱两可
是否使用了感谢和改期建议（三明治结构）
语言是否自然流畅，符合日常口语习惯

content.speakerText: C'mon, it'll be fun! You never come out anymore.
content.speakerTextCn: 来嘛，肯定好玩！你最近都不出门了。
expectedAnswers: I know I've been MIA lately—I really miss our hangouts. This weekend I'm just recharging, but I promise I'll be there next time!
You're right, I've been a bit of a hermit. But I'm trying to balance things out—I'd love to join you next week!
I feel bad about missing out. You guys are awesome—I'm just swamped this weekend, but let's not wait too long next time!
evaluationCriteria: 是否回应了对方的情感诉求（承认自己缺席）
是否用积极语言减轻拒绝的负面感
是否包含明确的未来承诺或改期意向

content.speakerText: We're having a potluck this Sunday—can you bring something?
content.speakerTextCn: 这周日我们有带菜聚餐，你能带点什么来吗？
expectedAnswers: Thanks for inviting me! I'd love to come, but I've got a prior commitment this Sunday. Can I join you next time instead?
I really appreciate the invite! I'm not available this weekend, but I'd be happy to bring something next time if you're still having one!
That's so kind of you to ask! Unfortunately, I'm tied up this weekend, but I'm definitely in for the next one—just tell me what to bring!
evaluationCriteria: 是否礼貌地拒绝了当前邀请
是否主动提出未来参与意愿
是否使用了场景关键词（potluck, invite, join, next time）
